Interface IItemPathsQuery2

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.DatasourcesRaster
Assembly
ESRI.Server.DatasourcesRaster.dll

Provides access to members that allow querying for paths stored in a mosaic dataset.

[InterfaceType(ComInterfaceType.InterfaceIsIUnknown)]
[Guid("E85A7589-1AD8-4ACC-9DCD-F7C32F4239E7")]
public interface IItemPathsQuery2 : IItemPathsQuery
